title: Cable Pulling
description: Expert cable pulling services for power, control, and instrumentation cables in Hong Kong.
overview: DES offers professional cable pulling services for all types of power, control, and instrumentation cables. Our experienced technicians use proper techniques and equipment to ensure cables are installed without damage.
scope: Cable pulling planning and tension calculation
Installation of power and control cables
Use of proper lubricants and pulling equipment
Segregation of power and instrumentation cables
process: Calculate pull tensions and plan sequence

cta.description: Tell us about your cable pulling requirements
